_description: LOCAL_VALID object with absent distributed predicates (Q=false, G=false, X=false) must not be promoted to GLOBAL_VALID, even when topology is present and epoch is valid.
_invariant: local correctness ≠ distributed legitimacy coherence. LOCAL_VALID does not imply GLOBAL_VALID. Absent quorum evidence (Q=false), global consensus evidence (G=false), and cryptographic integrity evidence (X=false), the classification ceiling is LOCAL_VALID regardless of topology presence or epoch validity.
_guard: classifyFromPredicates enforces: (Q && G && L && X) is required to reach CONVERGENCE_VALID or GLOBAL_VALID. With Q=false, G=false, X=false the function returns LOCAL_VALID unconditionally.
_db_guard: Migration 0053 trigger fcr_global_valid_requires_convergence_supersession enforces that any GLOBAL_VALID insert must supersede a CONVERGENCE_VALID record. A LOCAL_VALID record cannot be directly superseded by GLOBAL_VALID.
